title: My Hero Steve [MHS]
description: Do you want to be a hero? Who said you can't? With this Mod, you will have the powers of My Hero Academia Students.
body:
[![Wiki Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d668d42b2094ba7cb07c50c9c2f7a211640aac00_0.webp)](https://onur24turan25.wixsite.com/myherosteve)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![midoria](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/561dc1e4bba15582dc228f5d6d083bac1f415b16.png)

![Uraraka](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/beddf5f34b6f3bd20d1bd04dd1aa9f2d9ae029f5.png)

![Lida](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aac01f28d2982f167f281dcce78d3e2bd09b6048.png)

![Bakugo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/399734247c471978ec14b7fc907673f0d932d07e.png)

![Jiro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d3fce733cc170e2edc0e37784df484b173bcec1.png)

![Toru](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/771b2eac4c6b8362ff497a3f5841ef2324f257eb.png)

<font color="yellow">This mod is a fan-made project inspired by the anime My Hero Academia. **WAS NOT CREATED BY THE ORIGINAL CREATOR.**

**This is not Origins mod**

**This is not required Origins mod.**

![My hero academia logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d535f214a2bd812eb6ba529004148e6635b4713.png)

You will be able to play the game with the powers of My Hero Academia students and gain advantages.

![6 Powers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/089d3da556e5cd2f5c95508582c478a6c1fe611f.png)

# <font color="yellow">In This Mod:

<font color="yellow">**- Midoriya | <font color="green">_All For One_**

<font color="yellow">**- Uraraka | <font color="pink">_Zero Gravity_**

<font color="yellow">**- Lida | <font color="gray">_Engine_**

<font color="yellow">**- Bakugo | <font color="orange">_Explosion_**

<font color="yellow">**- Jiro | <font color="purple">_Earphone Jack_**

<font color="yellow">**- Toru | <font color="lime">_Invisibility_**

# <font color="yellow">How I change my Quirk ???
